name: spacex-daily-briefing
description: Daily investor-grade briefing on SpaceX / SPCX (post-IPO; merged with xAI — covers Starlink, the xAI/Grok AI segment + X, Starship, and Starshield). Live X + web search with Nasdaq/Yahoo analyst targets, SEC filings, and Kalshi prediction-market odds, distilled into a tight, price-moving tiered brief (headline, TL;DR, key metrics, segment watch, catalysts & risks, inline sources). Anti-fabrication: states only numbers it sourced that run; informational only, not financial advice.
